title: Largest Market Cap Strategy - Backtest & Dashboard

stories.title: Python Backtest Script
acceptanceCriteria: Script runs end-to-end without errors: python3 backtest.py
Uses yfinance to pull historical price data for top market cap companies and SPY
Implements strategy: hold #1 market cap company, switch to new #1 at next trading day open
Outputs total return, CAGR, Sharpe ratio, and max drawdown for both strategy and SPY
Generates a comparison chart saved as PNG showing strategy vs SPY cumulative returns
Covers at least 10 years of history (2014-2024+)

stories.title: Next.js Dashboard Website
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js project created in /Users/nicoparadigm/Desktop/SP1/web with working dev server
Homepage displays current #1 US company by market cap (name + ticker + market cap)
Homepage displays #2 company and the gap (both % and $ difference)
Uses free public data source (Yahoo Finance API or similar) via API route
Builds successfully with next build (ready for Vercel deploy)
vercel.json or similar config present if needed
